name: smartstock-ai
description: SmartStock AI - Local Business Demand Predictor & Inventory Intelligence Platform

scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,api -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @smartstock/web" "npm run dev -w @smartstock/api"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @smartstock/web && npm run build -w @smartstock/api
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @smartstock/web && npm run lint -w @smartstock/api
